sentences.arabic: نَسِيَ فَهْدٌ كَلِمَةَ الْمُرُورِ الْخَاصَّةَ بِهِ.

sentences.translation: Kliknuo je na zaboravio sam lozinku.

sentences.arabic: أَرْسَلَ التَّطْبِيقُ رِسَالَةً إِلَى بَرِيدِهِ الْإِلِكْتِرُونِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Aplikacija je poslala poruku na njegovu e-poštu.
sentences.translationEn: The app sent a message to his email.

sentences.translation: Otvorio je poruku i promijenio lozinku.
sentences.translationEn: He opened the message and changed his password.
